commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a shared bounded retry helper for transient FileProvider-style memory reads, routes memory-host-sdk, memory-core, and memory-wiki read paths through it, and adds focused regression coverage plus a Plugin SDK API baseline update.

PR surface: Source +96, Tests +284, Generated 0. Total +380 across 15 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source and PR proof: current main has direct non-retried reads in the reported memory/wiki paths, and the PR body includes copied runtime output showing injected transient read failures recover after retries. I did not run tests locally because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainer API-boundary judgment is needed on the new public Plugin SDK exports; there is no narrow automated repair until that direction is chosen.
